channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Multi-vehicle crash blocks three lanes on I-75 in Manatee County: FDOT
item.description: A multi-vehicle crash shut down three southbound lanes of Interstate 75 in Manatee County, causing traffic delays near State Road 64 in the Bradenton area.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Deputies seek suspects in Davenport retail theft and battery
item.description: A dispute over a tobacco purchase escalated into an alleged battery and retail theft in Davenport after a group left a store with stolen merchandise, according to investigators.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 'It's either eat or pay bills': Florida families desperate for answers after losing SNAP benefits to fraud
item.description: Tampa Bay area mothers say scammers drained their SNAP cards — with fraudulent charges traced to the same California address — and Florida offers no path to reimbursement.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man shot in leg in St. Petersburg, police investigating
item.description: A man was shot in the leg in St. Petersburg on Monday, and detectives are investigating what led to the shooting after the victim suffered injuries that were not considered life-threatening.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Meet the candidates: Questionnaire for Holmes Beach Mayor
item.description: Leading up to the 2026 Florida primary (August 19) and general election (November 3), Tampa Bay 28 contacted qualified candidates for Holmes Beach Mayor.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tropical Storm Bertha forms, threatening Gulf Coast with flooding rain and strong wind gusts
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha has formed in the northeastern Gulf and is expected to hit portions of the Gulf Coast from Florida to Louisiana, and possibly as far west as Texas.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] TROPICAL UPDATE: Bertha forms in the NE Gulf
[WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] What impacts will Florida see from Tropical Storm Bertha?

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Congress races against August recess deadline as Trump pushes SAVE America Act vote
item.description: Congress is running out of time before August recess — and President Trump is pushing hard for a vote on the SAVE America Act.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 20
item.description: President Trump imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, inside look at Tampa General Hospital's Aeromed team, and Chief Meteorologist Denis Phillips has the latest on when rain showers will end.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Dog killed in attack at North Port dog park
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] North River firefighter leans on family, faith as he battles stage 3 colon cancer

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump says Netanyahu won't face arrest if he visits NYC, downplaying Mamdani's threat
item.description: President Trump is pushing back on New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's threat to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu during a planned visit to New York in September.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] VIDEO: Yacht smashes into dock along New River in Fort Lauderdale
item.description: A yacht dubbed the "Determination" was being towed when it collided with the dock along New River in Fort Lauderdale on Monday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Scallop season brings millions of dollars to Pasco County's economy
item.description: Scallop season is more than a summertime tradition along Pasco County's Gulf Coast. It's also a significant economic driver that brings tens of thousands of visitors.
